zh.lifeSummary: 當William de Bohun 1st Earl of Northampton於1311年出生在威爾士蒙姆爾卡爾迪可特時，他的父親Humphrey VII de Bohun 4th Earl of Hereford35歲，母親Elizabeth of Rhuddlan29歲。他於1335年與Elizabeth Badlesmere在英國肯特巴德萊斯莫結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1340年登記服兵役。他於1352年被列為admiral of the northern seas fleet。他去世於1360年9月16日在英國英格蘭艾可莎佛朗 瓦爾登享年49歲，埋葬在英國艾可莎佛朗 瓦爾登瓦爾登 艾比。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bohun
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Moon
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Moyon in La Manche. Compare   Mounce  .
Americanized form of German   Mohn   or of some other similar (like-sounding) surname.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When William de Bohun 1st Earl of Northampton was born in 1311, in Caldicot, Monmouthshire, Wales, his father, Humphrey VII de Bohun 4th Earl of Hereford, was 35 and his mother, Elizabeth of Rhuddlan, was 29. He married Elizabeth Badlesmere in 1335, in Badlesmere, Kent, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He registered for military service in 1340. In 1352, his occupation is listed as admiral of the northern seas fleet. He died on 16 September 1360, in Saffron Walden, Essex, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 49, and was buried in Walden Abbey, Saffron Walden, Essex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William de Bohun 1st Earl of Northampton est né en 1311, à Caldicot, Monmouthshire, Galles, son père, Humphrey VII de Bohun 4th Earl of Hereford, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth of Rhuddlan, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Badlesmere en 1335, à Badlesmere, Kent, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1340. En 1352, sa profession de son indiquée est admiral of the northern seas fleet. Il est décédé le 16 septembre 1360, à Saffron Walden, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 49 ans, et a été enterré à Walden Abbey, Saffron Walden, Essex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als William de Bohun 1st Earl of Northampton 1311 in Caldicot, Monmouthshire, Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater Humphrey VII de Bohun 4th Earl of Hereford 35 und seine Mutter Elizabeth of Rhuddlan 29. Er hat 1335 in Badlesmere, Kent, England Elizabeth Badlesmere geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er hat sich 1340 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. 1352 ist sein Beruf als admiral of the northern seas fleet aufgeführt. Er starb am 16. September 1360 im Alter von 49 Jahren in Saffron Walden, Essex, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Walden Abbey, Saffron Walden, Essex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William de Bohun 1st Earl of Northampton è nato il nel 1311 nel Caldicot, Monmouthshire, Galles, il suo padre, Humphrey VII de Bohun 4th Earl of Hereford, aveva 35 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth of Rhuddlan, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Badlesmere nel 1335, nel Badlesmere, Kent, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1340. Nel 1352, la sua occupazione è indicata come admiral of the northern seas fleet. Morì il 16 settembre 1360, nel Saffron Walden, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 49 anni, e fu sepolto a Walden Abbey, Saffron Walden, Essex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: William de Bohun 1st Earl of Northamptonが1311年にウェールズモンモウスシュアイアカルディコトで生まれた時，父Humphrey VII de Bohun 4th Earl of Herefordは35歳，母Elizabeth of Rhuddlanは29歳であった。1335年にイギリスケントバドレスメアでElizabeth Badlesmereと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1340年に兵役登録をした。1352年，職業はadmiral of the northern seas fleetと記録されている。彼は1360年9月16日にイギリスイギリスエセックスサフロン ワルデンで49歳で死去し，イギリスエセックスサフロン ワルデンワルデン アビーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William de Bohun 1st Earl of Northampton(이)가 1311년 웨일스 몬모우스실르 캘딕트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Humphrey VII de Bohun 4th Earl of Hereford(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth of Rhuddlan(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1335년 영국 켄트 바들레스머에서 Elizabeth Badlesmere(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1340년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 1352년, 그의 직업은 admiral of the northern seas fleet이었다. 그는 1360년 9월 16일 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 사프런 월든에서 49세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 에세스 사프런 월든 월든 애브브이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William de Bohun 1st Earl of Northampton nasceu em 1311, em Caldicot, Monmouthshire, Gales, seu pai, Humphrey VII de Bohun 4th Earl of Hereford, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth of Rhuddlan, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Badlesmere em 1335, em Badlesmere, Kent, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1340. Em 1352, sua profissão aparece como admiral of the northern seas fleet. Ele faleceu em 16 de setembro de 1360, em Saffron Walden, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 49 anos, e foi sepultado em Walden Abbey, Saffron Walden, Essex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William de Bohun 1st Earl of Northampton родился в 1311 г. в местности калдикот, монмоутшир, Уэльс, его отцу по имени Humphrey VII de Bohun 4th Earl of Hereford было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth of Rhuddlan, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Badlesmere в 1335 г. в местности бадлесмир, кэнт, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. В 1340 году он поступил на военную службу. В 1352 годуработал по профессии admiral of the northern seas fleet. Он умер 16 сентября 1360 г. в местности саффрон валден, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 49 лет и был похоронен в местности валден эбби, саффрон валден, эссекс, Англия.

es.Westminster Abbey, London, England: Westminster Abbey, Westminster, London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido
es.lifeSummary: Cuando William de Bohun 1st Earl of Northampton nació en 1311, en Caldicot, Monmouthshire, Gales, su papá, Humphrey VII de Bohun 4th Earl of Hereford, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Elizabeth of Rhuddlan, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Badlesmere en 1335, en Badlesmere, Kent, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1340. En 1352, su ocupación registrada era admiral of the northern seas fleet. Murió el 16 de septiembre de 1360, en Saffron Walden, Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 49 años, y fue sepultado en Walden Abbey, Saffron Walden, Essex, Inglaterra.
